criteria.label: Evidence honesty and recon
criteria.full_credit: Maps the static motion surface and labels every runtime or feel claim as unverified.

criteria.label: Project conventions
criteria.full_credit: Reuses supplied tokens and the correct local precedent instead of inventing a parallel system.

criteria.label: Purpose and frequency
criteria.full_credit: Prioritizes keyboard and high-frequency restraint plus causal feedback over decoration.

criteria.label: Technical accuracy
criteria.full_credit: Diagnoses property cost, origin, interruption, pointer tracking, and primitive tradeoffs without framework myths.

criteria.label: Prioritization
criteria.full_credit: Vets and ranks a small set by user impact, frequency, confidence, and implementation cost.

criteria.label: Plan self-containment
criteria.full_credit: Plans include exact paths and excerpts, target behavior, steps, boundaries, and drift stop conditions.

criteria.label: Verification quality
criteria.full_credit: Provides targeted mechanical and runtime feel checks without claiming those checks ran.

criteria.label: Accessibility and performance
criteria.full_credit: Defines Reduced Motion behavior and measured performance checks while preserving useful feedback.
